title: Senior Software Engineer - MagicBricks South Asia Partners - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - MagicBricks South Asia Partners - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Join the MagicBricks South Asia Partners family as a Senior Software Engineer in Meerut. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About MagicBricks South Asia Partners:
MagicBricks South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MagicBricks South Asia Partners!
